title: 1 step DFU - Houston screen during CC update (only CC update)
scenario: Placing earbuds into charge case during 1-step CC DFU over 20% triggers Houston screen on Voyager Free 60+ and Voyager Legend 50
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected device.
2. Ensure a Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Legend 50 device is paired and connected.
3. Initiate a 1-step Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the Charge Case (CC) only.
4. Wait for the CC update progress to exceed 20%.
5. While the CC update is in progress (over 20%), place the earbuds into the charge case.
expected: The app should continue to display the DFU progress screen or a relevant update status without interruption.
